title: Simply Fly
description: It just adds a survival command. /fly lets you fly just like creative mod for constructing.
body:
A lightweight mod that adds the /fly command. 
It allows players to fly exactly like in Creative Mode while maintaining all Survival Mode aspects (health, hunger, and inventory). 
Includes built-in fall damage protection when flying is active. 
To disable flight, simply type /fly again.
If you have any doubt just add me on Discord as redogodo.
